task_completion.description: Verify that the survey points from 'pond_asbuilt.xyz' have been imported into TopoCal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: TopoCal window is open showing a point cloud or a list of imported points in the workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Digital Terrain Model (MDT / TIN) has been generated from the imported points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A triangulated irregular network (TIN) or 3D mesh is visible in the TopoCal main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the volume calculation tool was used with the reference elevation set to exactly 1845.50.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A volume calculation dialog or results window in TopoCal is visible, showing a fixed elevation (Cota) of 1845.50 and displaying the calculated volume.

task_completion.description: Verify that the TopoCal project is saved to 'C:\workspace\data\pond_project.tcp'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TopoCal window title bar shows 'pond_project.tcp', or a save dialog is visible saving the file to the 'C:\workspace\data\' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that a plain-text report is created at 'C:\workspace\data\capacity_report.txt' containing the calculated capacity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open showing the file 'capacity_report.txt' containing exactly one line like 'Capacity: XXXX.X m3'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the TopoCal graphical interface to perform the tasks rather than bypassing it with scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the TopoCal application UI being actively interacted with (menus, dialogs, and 3D view).

integrity.description: Ensure the volume written in the text report genuinely comes from the TopoCal calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The volume value (XXXX.X) in 'capacity_report.txt' must match the terraplen/fill volume displayed in the TopoCal results window.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just create the output files directly from a terminal without performing the software steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot history must show the progression of opening TopoCal, importing points, generating the MDT, and calculating the volume before the final text file is created.
